ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "supervisor_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee's direct supervisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or level of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each work schedule */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the schedule belongs to */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7) */,
  "time_start_in_minutes" INTEGER /* Start time of the schedule in minutes */,
  "time_end_in_minutes" INTEGER /* End time of the schedule in minutes */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., day, night, weekend) */,
  "flexible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the schedule is flexible */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Physical location where the employee works for this schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_schedules_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each time-off request */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the requested time off */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the requested time off */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the time-off request */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the supervisor who approved or rejected the request */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the record belongs to */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked out */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee was late */,
  "early_departure" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee left early */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Number of overtime hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the record belongs to */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of payroll */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "hours_worked" TEXT /* Number of hours worked in the payroll period */,
  "overtime_hours" TEXT /* Number of overtime hours worked in the payroll period */,
  "taxes" TEXT /* Amount of taxes deducted from the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the benefit belongs to */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit became active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the benefit was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the evaluation belongs to */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the employee's performance */,
  "evaluator_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who evaluated the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee the action belongs to */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of action */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of disciplinary action (e.g., warning, suspension) */,
  "action_taken_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who took the action */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_action_taken_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_taken_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "trainer_id" TEXT /* ID of the trainer who conducted the training */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "certification" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the training led to a certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
